# HIGH PRIORITY: Baseline Survey Protocol Finalization

**Issue Type:** Blocker (required before Feb 15 Go/No-Go)

**Problem:**
Detailed baseline survey protocol with day-by-day schedule and forms is incomplete (~40% done). Field teams need final protocol before Feb 20 deployment.

**Current State:**
- Status: ~40% draft
- Deadline: 18 Feb (final sign-off)
- Scope: 4-5 survey zones, ~200 households, household interview protocol

**Owner:** Field Engineering / Rocélio Silva

**Estimated Effort:** 3 days (finalize protocol, forms, training materials, stakeholder review)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Survey forms finalized and approved by ISPTEC
- [ ] Day-by-day schedule documented (Feb 26 — Mar 9)
- [ ] Ethical approval checklist added
- [ ] Training materials for technicians prepared
- [ ] Household interview protocol approved
- [ ] Checklist item 1.24 marked ✅
